song.title: Rock Bottom
song.keywords: rock bottom, despair, turning point, The Unseen Chorus
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Rock Bottom' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Rock Bottom Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical

twitter.title: Rock Bottom Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'Rock Bottom' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. Lowest point.

essay: Rock Bottom is the turning-point confession where denial finally fails. It names collapse plainly and becomes the narrative hinge between self-destruction and recovery.
song.lyricsHtml:
"It's over He's gone And I'm still here broken"

Porn on the screen but my hands feel cold
Desire's a ghost that I can't hold
The faces blur the hunger's died
I'm staring at nothing empty inside

This is the bottom my soul has been sold
I traded a love for a body to hold
This is the ending the silence the shame
A man in the mirror who won't say my name

The rooms are hollow the shadows are gone
I chased the night until there was no dawn
My voice is breaking no one replies
Just the wreck of a man with addiction in his eyes

What the fuck have I done what the fuck have I done to me

This is the bottom my soul has been sold
I traded a love for a body to hold
This is the ending the silence the shame
A man in the mirror who won't say my name

This is the bottom there's nowhere to fall
Alone in the dark I've lost it all
But if I am broken still I must try
A whisper of hope as the echoes die

This can't be the end of me
